setupGuide.title: How to populate DEX contract addresses
steps: 1. Wait for Pharos DEX (Uniswap V2 fork) to be deployed on testnet/mainnet
2. Find the Factory and Router addresses from Pharos explorer or official announcements
3. Update factory, router, and weth fields above
5. Run: ./scripts/swap.sh atlantic-testnet PHRS USDC 0.1 to test
setupGuide.autoDiscovery: Run 'cast code <address> --rpc-url <rpc>' to check if a contract exists at an address. Non-empty result means deployed.

note: DEX contracts are not yet deployed on Pharos (chain is in early stage as of June 2026). Permit2 (0x000000000022D473030F116dDEE9F6B43aC78BA3) is confirmed deployed on testnet, indicating active contract infrastructure. Router/Factory/WETH addresses are placeholders — replace with actual addresses once the Pharos DEX launches. This config follows the standard Uniswap V2 interface, ensuring immediate compatibility upon deployment.
